overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a cyberpunk-style urban environment in a block-based game engine. The player moves from a neon-lit street into a dark alley with a burning barrel, passing characters standing by the fire and revealing a seated figure working on a laptop.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow walkway beside a blocky stone wall, with a vibrant neon-lit cyberpunk street visible to the right. Overhead wires crisscross above as the scene gradually darkens approaching the alley entrance.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark enclosed alley illuminated by a burning barrel. A character in a teal shirt stands near the fire while a vending machine glows in the background. The neon street disappears behind as the firelight casts warm shadows on the blocky walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley gathering spot with fire and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches two standing characters near the burning barrel, then passes them to reveal a third character seated against the wall working on a laptop. Scattered cans litter the ground in this dimly lit alley gathering spot, with the fire providing the primary illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit urban walkway into the claustrophobic shadows of a dimly lit alleyway. It begins by gliding along a blocky stone wall beside a glowing cyberpunk street, with overhead wires crisscrossing as the environment gradually darkens toward an alley entrance. As the camera enters the enclosed space, the neon lights vanish, replaced by the warm, flickering glow of a burning barrel and a distant vending machine. The scene then pushes past characters standing by the fire, moving deeper into the alley where scattered cans litter the ground. Finally, the camera reveals a third figure seated against the wall, focused on a laptop under the primary illumination of the fire.
